kpis.name: Inspection Coverage
kpis.description: Total length of pipeline network inspected vs planned

kpis.name: Defect Detection Accuracy
kpis.description: Accuracy of ILI defect sizing against verification excavations

kpis.name: Critical Repair Time
kpis.description: Average mobilization and fix time for critical integrity issues

kpis.name: Budget Compliance
kpis.description: Actual spend vs. allocated budget (currently 20% over due to unforeseen excavations)

notes: Gulf Pipeline Integrity consistently exceeds all technical and operational KPIs. However they are currently 20.3% over budget, attributing it to 'unforeseen excavation requirements'. Their technical superiority is unquestioned but their cost management is a significant concern for the contract cycle.
